question_relevance_notes.linguistic: Judge asked for script analysis, squarely in linguistic domain.
question_relevance_notes.regulatory: Judge asked for infrastructure details, squarely in regulatory domain.
question_relevance_notes.meta: Judge asked for specific design details, squarely in meta domain.

response_update_notes.linguistic: Agent confirmed no text was visible, directly addressing the question.
response_update_notes.regulatory: Agent provided specific details about road edges and pole style.
response_update_notes.meta: Agent provided specific details about pole shape and lamp arm.

verdict.judge_question_strategy_notes: The judge correctly identified that the landscape and botanics agents were stuck on regional similarities. By targeting the meta and regulatory agents for specific infrastructure details (poles, walls, road edges), the judge successfully extracted the distinguishing features needed to resolve the ambiguity.
verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly prioritized the specific infrastructure evidence (square pole, curved lamp arm) provided by the meta and regulatory agents over the generic landscape/botanical evidence to confidently select Thailand.
verdict.discussion_convergence_notes: The discussion successfully narrowed the candidates from a broad regional set (TH, KH, LA) to a specific country (TH) by leveraging the specific infrastructure details identified in the follow-up questions.
